subject: Champa, Universe 6 Destroyer God, lunging forward with energy emanating from hands
description: A rotund, cat-eared purple humanoid figure lunges forward aggressively, one arm extended toward the viewer. The figure has a large round head with prominent cat-like ears and a wide body. Pink-red and golden energy swirls trail behind and around the figure. The composition is a dynamic mid-shot with the figure slightly foreshortened, creating a sense of forward momentum. The background is a warm reddish-orange gradient with streaking energy lines. The figure's posture and open-mouthed expression convey gleeful aggression.
foreground: rotund purple humanoid with cat-like ears, arm extended forward, open-mouthed grin
background: warm reddish-orange gradient with streaking energy lines
